title: Lantana Cheese Grater with Container – 6 Essential Kitchen Functions for Coarse, Medium, Fine, Micro-Grating/Zesting/Slicing. Hand held, Includes Fitted Measuring Tub with Lid
features: 6 in 1 Multifunction Design - for Brilliant Results every time. All-purpose grater featuring 6 essential functions for everyday grating, slicing, shredding and zesting. Perfect for Grating Cheese, Carrot, Vegetables, Parmesan, Nutmeg, Ginger, Garlic, Chocolate, Coconut, it also doubles as a lemon zester and handy vegetable slicer.

Fitted Measuring Container - Grate directly into the fitted hexagonal container (included) for easy grating with less mess. The container also features useful measuring lines for easy and accurate measurement of ingredients. The container also comes with a lid for grated foods to be safely stored for later use. Container fits upside down into the grater body for easy storage and space-saving.

Non-Slip/Non-Scratch Silicone Rubber Base - for a great grip while grating onto kitchen surfaces and a snug fit while grating into the fitted container. Also features a widened base and an ergonomic, heavy duty handle for maximum control and grip.

Stylish & Durable Design - designed for toughness and superb functionality, but also looks great in any kitchen. Features a sturdy rust-resistant stainless-steel case with sharp blades for effective grating and slicing. Easy to clean and Dishwasher Safe.
description: Product Description The Lantana 6 in 1 Grater with Container - For Brilliant Results Every Time The Lantana 6 in 1 grater with container is a versatile 6-sided grater designed to handle any grating job in your kitchen with ease. Includes a funky hexagonal fitted container that fits snugly onto the bottom of the grater for easy collection and less mess. Both stylish and durable, the Grater features a sturdy, rust-resistant stainless-steel case with sharp blades for effective grating and slicing. It also has a Non-Slip/non-scratch Silicone rubber base an ergonomic handle for greater control and grip. Easy to clean and Dishwasher Safe. MAIN FEATURES: 6 IN 1 MULTIFUNCTION DESIGN - for Brilliant Results every time. All-purpose grater featuring 6 essential functions for everyday grating, slicing, shredding and zesting. Perfect for Grating Cheese, Carrot, Vegetables, Parmesan, Nutmeg, Ginger, Garlic, Chocolate, Coconut, it also doubles as a lemon zester and handy vegetable slicer. FITTED MEASURING CONTAINER - Grate directly into the fitted hexagonal container (included) for easy grating with less mess. The container also features useful measuring lines for easy and accurate measurement of ingredients. The container also comes with a lid for grated foods to be safely stored for later use. Container fits upside down into the grater body for easy storage and space-saving. NON-SLIP/NON-SCRATCH SILICONE RUBBER BASE - for a great grip while grating onto kitchen surfaces and a snug fit while grating into the fitted container. Also features a widened base and an ergonomic, heavy duty handle for maximum control and grip. STYLISH & DURABLE DESIGN - designed for toughness and superb functionality, but also looks great in any kitchen. Features a sturdy rust-resistant stainless-steel case with sharp blades for effective grating and slicing. Easy to clean and Dishwasher Safe. Product Size - Grater - 23.6cm x 14cm, Container - 8cm x 14cm Cleaning Instructions - Grater and container are both dishwasher safe. Silicone base can be removed for cleaning separately and to assist water dispersal.
